description: Explicit UI contract for the Sovereign portal /policies route.

header.title: Sovereignty policies
header.subtitle: National policies enforced via the registry.

cell.v04_hardcoded: YES (all v0.4 mock policies are enforced)

no_rows.body_text: No sovereignty policies configured. Ask an admin to define them.

non_negotiables: PageHeader has NO action buttons. Policy authoring lives on the admin portal.
Page title is 'Sovereignty policies' (NOT 'Policies' alone — distinguishes from admin's same-titled route).
DataTable column order is fixed: Policy → Scope → Enforced → Updated.
Enforced cell uses uppercase YES / NO text with green / muted colour map.
Em dash (U+2014) in policy names like 'PII handling — Mauritian DPA' MUST be preserved.
DataTable rows are non-interactive in v0.4 — do NOT bind onRowClick.
List response MUST NOT include the policy body (Rego/CEL source); fetch via the admin endpoint when needed.
This page is a SUBSET of admin's policy catalogue — only sovereignty-relevant policies.
